name: libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3
title: libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3
description:
NVIDIA PKCS #11 Library (OpenSSL 3) (Tesla 535 version)
The Compute Unified Device Architecture (CUDA) enables NVIDIA
graphics processing units (GPUs) to be used for massively parallel
general purpose computation.
.
This package contains the NVIDIA PKCS #11 library with OpenSSL 3 backend.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3 because NVIDIA PKCS #11 Library (OpenSSL 3) (Tesla 535 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnvidia-tesla-535-pkcs11-openssl3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
